content:
Past Continuous Tense

အရင်တုန်းက လုပ်နေတုန်းပဲဆိုတာကို ပြောချင်ရင် သုံးပါတယ်။ 'was/were + verb-ing' ပုံစံနဲ့ သုံးရပါတယ်။

Structure/Formula: Subject + was/were + verb-ing + Object

👉 I was playing football in the playground at 4 PM yesterday.

👉 They were watching a movie when I arrived at their house.

👉 She was cooking rice while her mother was washing clothes.

👉 The students were studying English in the classroom at 9 AM yesterday.

🔑 Key Points:

  • I, He, She, It, Singular noun → was သုံးပါ
  • We, You, They, Plural noun → were သုံးပါ
  • Verb အဆုံးမှာ -ing တပ်ရပါမယ်
  • when နဲ့ while ဆိုတဲ့ စကားလုံးတွေနဲ့ အများဆုံး တွဲသုံးပါတယ်

⚠️ Common Mistakes:

  • was/were ကို မှားသုံးတာ (ဥပမာ - They was ❌ → They were ✓)
  • verb-ing မထည့်ဘဲ verb ရိုးရိုးသုံးတာ (ဥပမာ - I was play ❌ → I was playing ✓)
  • was/were နဲ့ verb-ing နှစ်ခုစလုံး မပါဘဲ တစ်ခုတည်းပါတာ
